Actions.Text: REFERRED TO INVESTIGATIONS AND GOVERNMENT OPERATIONS

Title: Extends certain provisions authorizing the city of Syracuse to impose a hotel and motel tax
Summary: Extends certain provisions authorizing the city of Syracuse to impose a hotel and motel tax to December 31, 2029.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend chapter 519 of the laws of 2024 amending the tax law relating to authorizing the city of Syracuse to impose a hotel and motel tax, in relation to extending the effectiveness thereof
